canonical.text: Add an options argument to parseCSV: parseCSV(csv, {trim: false}) disables field trimming; default behavior stays trimmed. First delegate to subagent explorer: find where trimming happens and which tests cover it. Implement the option and add one test covering trim:false. Then delegate to subagent verifier to confirm the change is complete and minimal. Finish by running node --test — all tests must pass.
